hero_sub: Real ingredients. No fillers. No nonsense. La Cocina de Thor™ was born with one promise: honest food, with a name and a purpose — made in Spain with love for those who matter most.

annual growth
in premium pet food
mkt_i1_strong: Premium customers don't compromise on the label:
mkt_i1_text: over 70% read the ingredients and reject anything they don't recognise. Honesty isn't an added value — it IS the product.
mkt_i2_strong: Made in Spain is a real differentiator:
mkt_i2_text: local origin builds trust, drives purchase and outweighs price in the premium segment.
about_c1_text: Made in Spain with certified raw materials from Spain and Italy. Full traceability, from source to shelf. No shortcuts.
about_c2_text: No preservatives, colourants or flavourings. The ingredients you see are exactly what's inside. No fine print. No surprises.
about_c3_text: Formulas developed with veterinary nutritionists to ensure complete nutrition at every life stage. Science behind the love.
about_c4_text: Responsible supply chain, recyclable packaging and firm support for the local economy. For the planet, too.
about_mission: "They ask for nothing and give everything. La Cocina de Thor was born with one promise: honest nutrition, real ingredients and total transparency — so owners and vets always choose with confidence and with love."
qlty_sub: At La Cocina de Thor we hide nothing behind strange names. Every ingredient has a clear, recognisable nutritional purpose. No fillers, no surprises, no label deception.
qlty_p1_text: The first ingredient is always fresh meat or fish. High-bioavailability real protein. No tricks.
qlty_p2_text: Banana (potassium), pear (fibre), pineapple (bromelain), apple (pectin). Not flavourings. Real ingredients.
qlty_p3_text: Wet format provides real daily hydration — especially vital for cats that drink little.
qlty_p4_text: Every batch verified: crude protein, fat, moisture and ash. Results go on the label. Full stop.
ben_c1_text: 200 gr (cat), 400 gr and 1 kg (dog) formats. High purchase frequency in the premium segment. Shelving that moves product.
ben_c2_text: Sustainable premium pricing with competitive margins for distributors. A product that sells itself on the shelf.
ben_c3_text: The Spanish consumer demands local and natural products. La Cocina de Thor fits both trends exactly.
ben_c4_text: Design with real ingredient photography. Communicates quality in 3 seconds. Customers pick it up with their eyes before reading the label.
ben_c5_text: Permanent stock and confirmed delivery times. Flexible minimum orders. No out-of-stock surprises.
ben_c6_text: POS materials, in-store promoters and digital co-marketing campaigns. Together, to get sales off the ground.
sus_sub: Every La Cocina de Thor™ can and every Vibrisse Shake is the result of a responsible supply chain. We work with quality European suppliers, reduce our carbon footprint and commit to circularity. No excuses.
sus_p1_text: Certified European companies that reduce transport and support the local economy. We know where every ingredient comes from.
sus_p2_text: 100% recyclable cans. Optimised design to reduce material and weight. Less plastic. More real commitment.
sus_p3_text: High-value nutritional cuts. No unnecessary fillers, no artificial additives, no waste disguised with technical names.
cta_sub: Straight to the point: get in touch and we'll prepare a personalised proposal with terms, samples and a launch plan. We're direct, fast, and we deliver on our promises.
p_dog_salmon_tagline: Omega-3 for a shiny coat & healthy skin
p_dog_salmon_desc: Complete wet food for adult dogs with fresh salmon and selected fruits. Provides Omega-3 & 6 for a shiny coat and healthy skin. No artificial preservatives.
p_dog_chicken_tagline: Lean protein & natural potassium from banana
p_dog_chicken_desc: Fresh chicken combined with natural banana. Rich in potassium, vitamins B6 and C for an active, muscular dog. Gluten-free. Hypoallergenic.
p_dog_turkey_desc: Turkey (lean meat) with natural bromelain from pineapple. Ideal for dogs with digestive sensitivity, overweight or in recovery. Low in fat.
p_dog_ham_desc: Ham with natural pear fibre. A premium gastronomic proposal for the most discerning dogs, combining flavour with real digestive benefits.
p_dog_chickenpork_desc: Complete wet food for dogs made with 100% fresh chicken and pork, slow-cooked to preserve flavour and nutrients. No artificial preservatives.
p_dog_fishpork_desc: Complete wet food for dogs made with 100% fresh fish and pork. Slow-cooked. Natural ingredients, suitable for all breeds.
p_dog_chickenpork_seco_desc: Complete dry food for dogs made with 100% fresh chicken and pork. Slow-cooked for maximum digestibility and flavour. Suitable for all breeds.
p_dog_fishpork_seco_desc: Complete dry food for dogs made with 100% fresh fish and pork. Slow-cooked. Natural ingredients, suitable for all breeds.
p_cat_salmon_desc: Premium salmon formula for adult cats. High palatability even for selective felines. Added taurine essential for the cat's cardiac and visual health.
p_cat_anchovy_desc: Mediterranean anchovy with fresh pear. Provides DHA, EPA and natural fibre. For cats with sensitive digestion. Irresistible Mediterranean flavour.
p_cat_chicken_desc: 93% fresh chicken meat. Promotes strong muscle and sustainable energy. Banana provides potassium, vitamins B6 and C. Complete grain-free food.
p_cat_rabbit_desc: Hypoallergenic rabbit for cats with allergies or intolerances. Apple provides natural pectin to improve nutrient absorption and care for intestinal flora.
p_sal_pork_desc: Pork sausages with fresh vegetables. Family 1 kg format. Complete food with soft texture and easy individual portioning. No preservatives.
p_sal_chicken_desc: Chicken with real vegetables. Rich in protein, fibre, vitamins and minerals. No fillers, colourants or artificial preservatives. Balanced complete nutrition.
p_sal_fish_desc: Blue fish with selected vegetables. Rich in marine Omega-3. Promotes healthy joints, cognitive function and shiny coat.
p_sal_multi_tagline: 3 premium proteins in a single formula
p_sal_multi_desc: Combination of chicken, pork and fish. Designed to meet all nutritional needs in a single complete and balanced formula. For all breeds.
p_snk_tendon_desc: Naturally dehydrated beef tendon. Long-lasting entertainment that promotes dental health. 100% natural, no additives or preservatives. Single ingredient.
p_snk_ear_desc: Naturally dehydrated pig ear. Minimum 75% crude protein, 5% fat. Premium chew made with Spanish pork. Cares for teeth while entertaining for hours.
p_vib_chicken_desc: Complementary wet food for adult cats. Fresh chicken (5%), potato starch, refined sunflower oil. Very high moisture (96%) for maximum hydration. No artificial preservatives.
p_vib_duck_desc: Complementary wet food for adult cats. Duck (4%) + chicken (1%), enriched cooking broth. Alternative protein source ideal for cats with sensitivity to conventional chicken.
p_vib_tuna_desc: Complementary wet food for adult cats. Tuna (5%), fish broth. Liquid fish base formula for maximum palatability and omega fatty acid intake. Highly hydrating.
p_vib_senior_tagline: FOS prebiotics + Vitamin C — formulated for seniors
p_vib_senior_desc: Complementary food for senior cats. Tuna (5.1%), FOS prebiotics for intestinal flora, antioxidant Vitamin C (900 mg/kg). Supports immune system and digestion in old age.
p_vib_kitten_desc: Complementary food for kittens. Chicken (4%) + tuna (1%), omega-3 (0.25%) for brain and visual development. Glycine as natural flavouring. Nutrition adapted to the growth phase.
